calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-08-2014 Off Calendar

Application For Prove-Up Date
Off Calendar Jul-17-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Jill Bates-Moore, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff THE CEI GROUP, INC.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) JAMI VELEZ.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

Nanette Stoback sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $19,870.01
Pre-Judgment Interest at the annual rate of 7%: $4,644.39
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $435.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $24,949.40
Judgment signed in open court.
